questions.text: The three R's for conservation of resources are:
questions.explanation: The three R's are Reduce (minimize use), Reuse (use again), and Recycle (process waste into new products).

questions.text: Chipko Andolan was started to save trees.
questions.explanation: Chipko Andolan was a forest conservation movement where people hugged trees to prevent cutting.

questions.correctAnswer: Development that meets present needs without compromising future generations' ability to meet their needs.
questions.explanation: Sustainable development balances economic growth with environmental protection for future generations.

questions.text: Ganga Action Plan was launched in year ________.
questions.explanation: Ganga Action Plan was launched in 1985 to reduce pollution and clean the Ganga river.
